description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard featuring a standard key layout with a dedicated numeric keypad on the right side. The keyboard has a low-profile, rectangular form factor with evenly spaced, slightly raised keys arranged in straight rows. The surface appears to be made of a single molded piece of plastic, with each keycap integrated into the main body. There are no visible cables, ports, or branding elements on the exterior, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The color is a uniform light gray, and the finish is matte, reducing glare and fingerprints. The overall design suggests it is intended for desktop use in office or urban environments.
description: A full-size, light gray keyboard with a numeric keypad and a minimalist, matte finish. The keys are evenly spaced and integrated into a low-profile rectangular body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entire keyboard layout, including the main alphanumeric section and the numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth and low profile of the keyboard, with the numeric keypad visible in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the keyboard's length and the arrangement of the keys from the back, with the numeric keypad on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the main key area and the numeric keypad receding into the background.
